name: Iron Ore
notes: Mined from iron ore nodes.

name: Copper Ore
notes: Mined from copper ore nodes.

name: Limestone

name: Coal
notes: Mined from coal nodes.

notes: Mined from caterium ore nodes.

name: Raw Quartz
notes: Mined from quartz nodes.

name: Sulfur
notes: Mined from sulfur nodes.

name: Bauxite
notes: Mined from bauxite nodes.

name: Uranium Ore
notes: Mined from uranium nodes. Radioactive.

name: SAM
notes: Strange Alien Metal. Mined from SAM nodes.

name: Crude Oil
notes: Extracted from oil nodes. Transported via pipes.

name: Water
notes: Extracted via water extractors. Transported via pipes.

name: Nitrogen Gas
notes: Extracted from nitrogen nodes. Transported via pipes.

name: Leaves
notes: Harvested from plants in the world.

name: Wood
notes: Harvested from trees in the world.

name: Mycelia
notes: Harvested from fungal plants.

name: Beryl Nut
notes: Harvested from beryl nut bushes.

name: Paleberry
notes: Harvested from paleberry plants.

name: Bacon Agaric
notes: Harvested from bacon agaric mushrooms.

name: Alien Protein
notes: Obtained from alien creature remains.

name: Hog Remains
notes: Dropped by Alpha Hogs.

name: Hatcher Remains
notes: Dropped by Hatchers.

name: Stinger Remains
notes: Dropped by Stingers.

name: Plasma Spitter Remains
notes: Dropped by Plasma Spitters.

name: Blue Power Slug
notes: Found in the world. Used to craft Power Shards (1 slug = 1 shard).

name: Yellow Power Slug
notes: Found in the world. Used to craft Power Shards (1 slug = 2 shards).

name: Purple Power Slug
notes: Found in the world. Used to craft Power Shards (1 slug = 3 shards).

name: Hard Drive
notes: Found in crash sites. Used to unlock alternate recipes.

name: Mercer Sphere
notes: Special artifact found in the world. Used for dimensional depots.

name: Somersloop
notes: Special artifact found in the world. Used for production amplification.

name: Uranium Waste
notes: Byproduct of uranium fuel rods in nuclear power plants. Radioactive.

name: Plutonium Waste
notes: Byproduct of plutonium fuel rods in nuclear power plants. Radioactive.

name: Iron Ingot
notes: Smelted from Iron Ore.

name: Copper Ingot
notes: Smelted from Copper Ore.

name: Caterium Ingot
notes: Smelted from Caterium Ore.

name: Steel Ingot
notes: Produced from Iron Ore and Coal in a Foundry.

name: Aluminum Ingot
notes: Produced from Aluminum Scrap in a Foundry.

name: Ficsite Ingot
notes: Phase 5 endgame ingot produced from Reanimated SAM in a Converter.

notes: Basic iron component.

name: Iron Rod
notes: Basic iron component.

name: Screw
notes: Small fastener made from Iron Rods.

name: Wire

name: Cable
notes: Made from Wire.

notes: Structural component made from Reinforced Iron Plates and Iron Rods.

name: Stator

name: Motor
notes: Electric motor assembled from Rotors and Stators.

notes: Space Elevator phase 1 component.

name: Copper Sheet

name: Concrete
notes: Made from Limestone.

name: Quartz Crystal
notes: Processed from Raw Quartz.

notes: Processed from Raw Quartz.

name: Steel Beam
notes: Structural steel component.

name: Versatile Framework
notes: Space Elevator phase 2 component.

name: Automated Wiring
notes: Space Elevator phase 2 component.

name: Encased Industrial Beam

name: Circuit Board

name: Empty Canister

name: Plastic

name: Rubber
notes: Produced from Crude Oil in a Refinery.

name: Polymer Resin

notes: Space Elevator phase 3 component.

notes: Radioactive plutonium fuel cell.

notes: Radioactive uranium fuel cell.

notes: Space Elevator phase 4 component.

notes: Space Elevator phase 4 component.

notes: Space Elevator phase 4 component.

name: Uranium Fuel Rod
notes: Fuel for nuclear power plants.

name: Plutonium Pellet
notes: Radioactive pellet used in plutonium fuel rods.

name: Non-Fissile Uranium
notes: Processed uranium that cannot sustain a chain reaction.

name: Nuclear Pasta
notes: Dense pasta-like nuclear material. Space Elevator phase 4.

name: Iodine-Infused Filter
notes: Advanced filter for Hazmat Suit in radioactive environments.

name: Gas Filter
notes: Filter cartridge for the Gas Mask.

name: Iron Rebar
notes: Used as ammunition in the Rebar Gun.

name: Stun Rebar
notes: Electrified rebar that stuns creatures.

name: Shatter Rebar
notes: Rebar that shatters on impact for area damage.

name: Explosive Rebar
notes: High-explosive rebar ammunition.

name: Black Powder
notes: Explosive powder used in ammunition and nobelisks.

name: Smokeless Powder
notes: Advanced propellant for rifle ammunition.

name: Nobelisk
notes: Standard explosive device.

name: Cluster Nobelisk
notes: Explosive that disperses cluster bomblets.

name: Gas Nobelisk
notes: Explosive that disperses toxic gas.

name: Nuke Nobelisk
notes: Nuclear explosive device. Extremely powerful and radioactive.

name: Rifle Ammo
notes: Standard rifle ammunition.

name: Homing Rifle Ammo
notes: Self-guided rifle ammunition.

name: Turbo Rifle Ammo
notes: High-velocity rifle ammunition requiring Turbofuel.

name: Alien DNA Capsule
notes: Encapsulated alien genetic material made from creature remains.

name: Power Shard
notes: Overclocking component crafted from Power Slugs.

name: SAM Fluctuator
notes: Phase 5 component made from Reanimated SAM.

name: Petroleum Coke
notes: Carbon byproduct of heavy oil residue processing. Used as fuel.

name: Biomass
notes: Basic biomass fuel made from organic materials (leaves, wood, mycelia).

name: Solid Biofuel
notes: Compressed biofuel blocks for biomass burners.

name: Compacted Coal
notes: Dense coal used as high-energy fuel and in turbofuel production.

name: Biocoal
notes: Coal substitute made from biomass. Alternate recipe.

name: Charcoal
notes: Charcoal made from Wood. Alternate recipe.

name: Fuel
notes: Refined liquid fuel produced from Crude Oil. Transported via pipes.

name: Turbofuel
notes: High-energy liquid fuel. Transported via pipes.

name: Rocket Fuel
notes: High-thrust liquid rocket fuel. Transported via pipes.

name: Ionized Fuel
notes: Phase 5 ionized liquid fuel. Transported via pipes.

name: Liquid Biofuel
notes: Liquid form of biofuel produced from Solid Biofuel. Transported via pipes.

name: Heavy Oil Residue
notes: Heavy byproduct of crude oil refining. Transported via pipes.

name: Alumina Solution
notes: Aluminum oxide dissolved in water. Transported via pipes.

name: Sulfuric Acid
notes: Corrosive acid used in advanced recipes. Transported via pipes.

name: Nitric Acid
notes: Corrosive acid used in advanced recipes. Transported via pipes.

name: Dissolved Silica
notes: Silica dissolved in liquid form. Used in alternate aluminum recipes. Transported via pipes.

notes: Water packaged in an Empty Canister for belt transport.

name: Packaged Oil
notes: Crude Oil packaged in an Empty Canister for belt transport.

name: Packaged Fuel
notes: Fuel packaged in an Empty Canister for belt transport.

name: Packaged Heavy Oil Residue
notes: Heavy Oil Residue packaged in an Empty Canister for belt transport.

name: Packaged Liquid Biofuel
notes: Liquid Biofuel packaged in an Empty Canister for belt transport.

notes: Alumina Solution packaged in an Empty Canister for belt transport.

notes: Sulfuric Acid packaged in an Empty Canister for belt transport.

notes: Nitric Acid packaged in an Empty Fluid Tank for belt transport.

name: Packaged Turbofuel
notes: Turbofuel packaged in an Empty Canister for belt transport.

name: Packaged Rocket Fuel
notes: Rocket Fuel packaged in an Empty Fluid Tank for belt transport.

name: Packaged Ionized Fuel
notes: Ionized Fuel packaged in an Empty Fluid Tank for belt transport.

name: Chainsaw
notes: Tool for harvesting wood and leaves quickly. Uses Solid Biofuel.

name: Jetpack
notes: Fuel-powered personal flight equipment. Uses Fuel or Turbofuel.

name: Hoverpack
notes: Power grid-powered personal flight equipment.

name: Gas Mask
notes: Protective mask for toxic gas environments. Consumes Gas Filters.

name: Hazmat Suit
notes: Full protective suit for radioactive environments. Consumes Iodine-Infused Filters.

name: Blade Runners
notes: Leg equipment for significantly increased movement speed.

name: Zipline
notes: Equipment for traversing power lines as ziplines.

name: Rebar Gun
notes: Ranged weapon that fires various rebar ammunition types.

name: Object Scanner
notes: Handheld scanner for locating resources and items in the world.

name: Portable Miner
notes: Deployable manual mining device placed on resource nodes.

name: Nobelisk Detonator
notes: Remote detonation device used with Nobelisk explosives.

name: Xeno-Basher
notes: Upgraded melee weapon effective against wildlife.

name: Xeno-Zapper
notes: Electric melee weapon for stunning and damaging creatures.

name: Nutritional Inhaler
notes: Medical inhaler for restoring health (also called Medicinal Inhaler).

name: Parachute
notes: Single-use deployable parachute for fall protection.

name: Rifle
notes: Ranged firearm that fires Rifle Ammo, Homing Ammo, and Turbo Rifle Ammo.

name: Reanimated SAM
notes: Phase 5 material produced from SAM ore in a Converter.

name: Time Crystal
notes: Phase 5 temporal crystal produced from Diamonds in a Converter.

name: Dark Matter Residue
notes: Phase 5 dark matter byproduct produced in a Converter.

name: Dark Matter Crystal
notes: Phase 5 concentrated dark matter crystal.

name: Excited Photonic Matter
notes: Phase 5 photonic matter in an energetically excited state.

name: Diamonds
notes: Phase 5 synthetic diamonds produced in a Converter.

name: Ficsite Trigon
notes: Phase 5 geometric component produced from Ficsite Ingots.

name: Ficsonium
notes: Phase 5 exotic material produced from Plutonium Waste and SAM.

name: Singularity Cell
notes: Phase 5 extreme-density energy cell.

name: Superposition Oscillator
notes: Phase 5 quantum superposition oscillator.

name: Neural-Quantum Processor
notes: Phase 5 quantum neural processing unit.

name: AI Expansion Server
notes: Phase 5 AI infrastructure expansion component.

name: Alien Power Matrix
notes: Phase 5 alien energy matrix.

name: Ballistic Warp Drive
notes: Phase 5 FTL propulsion system component.

name: Ficsonium Fuel Rod
notes: Phase 5 exotic fuel rod made from Ficsonium.

name: Biochemical Sculptor
notes: Phase 5 biological engineering and sculpting component.

name: Plutonium Fuel Rod
notes: Fuel for nuclear power plants. Radioactive. Produces Plutonium Waste.

name: Uranium
notes: Processed uranium from Uranium Ore via Refinery
